channel.title: Projects on Jiarui Hai
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Jiarui Hai

item.title: Automatic Rap Music Synthesis
item.description: Introduction Considering the promising market of rap music in social media and the poor performance of speech-to-singing methods for rap music, our team decided to focus on rap music synthesis.

item.title: Multi-modal Music Emotion Recognition
item.description: Introduction Music emotion recognition (MER) has become a research hotspot in recent years.
